metadata.description: Historical National League team performance data and trend analysis across past seasons

scopes.source: Baseball-Reference, Baseball Almanac, Baseball Data Hub

scopes.tier: Step 1 of National League System (5th tier English football)

overview.description: The National League of Professional Baseball Clubs, founded in 1876, is the oldest continuously operating professional sports league in North America.

franchise_moves_tracked.note: All-time records include New York tenure

history_was: Originally Philadelphia Athletics, moved to KC, then Oakland
franchise_moves_tracked.note: Now in AL; historically part of early NL discussions

head_to_head_records_sample.description: Sample of key NL franchise-vs-franchise all-time win-loss records (1876–2026). Format: W-L.

key_seasons.event: American Association founded as rival league
First World Series between NL and AL champions
New York Mets and Houston Colt .45s expand NL to 10 teams
Season shortened by players' strike; World Series cancelled
Tampa Bay Devil Rays and Arizona Diamondbacks join (NL adopted wild card)

overview.description: The National League is a professional association football league in England, functioning as the fifth tier of the English football league system and Step 1 of the National League System.
overview.structure: Step 1 of National League System (above National League North and South at Step 2)

historical_context.formed_from: Northern Premier League and Southern League leading teams
historical_context.key_figures: Alan Hardaker (long-serving Secretary of the Football League) suggested amalgamation of the two strongest lower leagues
historical_context.growth: Grew from leading non-league teams in 1979 to a formalized national league structure

visualization_ideas.title: MLB NL Franchise Win-Loss Trend Lines (1876-2026)
visualization_ideas.description: Plot year-by-year winning percentages for each NL franchise to show dominance eras

visualization_ideas.title: English NL Championship Points Distribution (2016/17-2024/25)
visualization_ideas.description: Compare points totals across recent seasons to show competitive balance

visualization_ideas.title: NL Head-to-Head Win Matrix (MLB)
visualization_ideas.description: Visualize which franchise matchups have the largest historical win-loss gaps

visualization_ideas.title: English NL Relegation Battle Timeline
visualization_ideas.description: Track points earned by bottom-finishing teams across seasons
